# Tenu.World

> Tenu is a tenant-facing tool that scores rental deposit risk from photos and generates ready-to-send dispute letters, for tenants in France and the United Kingdom. Operated by Global Apex.Net (SAS, France). Soft launch May 2026.

Tenu.World turns a batch of move-in or move-out photos into two deliverables: a **risk analysis report** estimating how much of the deposit a landlord could reasonably withhold based on observed wear, and an optional **template dispute letter** pre-formatted for the jurisdiction (recorded-delivery letter in France, TDS/DPS/MyDeposits scheme claim in the UK). The service is document generation, not legal advice. French and English legal output only; user interface in 10 languages.

## Core

- [Homepage](https://tenu.world/): product overview, three-step flow, pricing summary
- [Pricing](https://tenu.world/pricing): EUR 15 / GBP 15 risk scan, EUR 25 / GBP 25 dispute letter, flat-rate launch pricing
- [Legal documents](https://tenu.world/legal): privacy, terms, refund policy — French and English

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy (EN)](https://tenu.world/legal/privacy/en): who processes data, retention, sub-processors, RGPD rights
- [Privacy Policy (FR)](https://tenu.world/legal/privacy/fr): politique de confidentialite, conforme RGPD
- [Terms of Service (EN)](https://tenu.world/legal/terms/en): template-not-advice clause, mediation path, French law
- [Terms of Service (FR)](https://tenu.world/legal/terms/fr): conditions generales d'utilisation
- [Refund Policy (EN)](https://tenu.world/legal/refund/en): L221-28 / UK CCR 2013 Reg 37 digital-goods waiver, three refund scenarios
- [Refund Policy (FR)](https://tenu.world/legal/refund/fr): politique de remboursement

## Key facts

- Operator: Global Apex.Net SAS, SIREN 941 666 067, RCS Versailles, registered office 4 Boulevard du Chateau, 78280 Guyancourt, France
- Share capital: EUR 100
- Jurisdictions supported: France, United Kingdom
- AI provider: Anthropic (Claude Haiku for photo analysis, Claude Sonnet for letter drafting)
- Training opt-out: all AI calls set the training opt-out flag; user photos are never used to train models
- Data residency: EU (Cloudflare R2 EU, Supabase EU)
- Contact: support@tenu.world (general), dpo@tenu.world (data protection)

## Optional

- [GitHub](https://github.com/malikmubashir/tenu-world): public repository
